text: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY): Holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors. Benefits: Grants for agriculture infrastructure and allied activities.
Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY): Har Khet Ko Pani. Benefits: Water use efficiency and expanded cultivable area under assured irrigation.
Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana: Promotion of organic farming. Benefits: Cluster-based organic farming with PGS certification and financial assistance.
National Beekeeping & Honey Mission: Keeping and honey production for income generation. Benefits: Support for scientific beekeeping and value chain development.
Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Blue Revolution. Benefits: Support for fishers, fish farmers, and integrated fish processing units.
Soil Health Card Scheme: Soil testing for balanced use of fertilizers. Benefits: Periodic soil health cards and recommendations for nutrient management.
National Agriculture Market (e-NAM): Unified national market for agricultural commodities. Benefits: Better price discovery and online trading platform for farmers.
Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS): Holistic development of children. Benefits: Supplementary nutrition, immunization, and pre-school non-formal education.
National AIDS Control Programme: Prevention and control of HIV/AIDS. Benefits: Free ART treatment, counseling, and awareness campaigns.
Nikshay Poshan Yojana: Financial support for TB patients. Benefits: ₹500 per month for nutritional support to all notified TB patients.
Atal Bhujal Yojana: Sustainable groundwater management. Benefits: Community participation and demand-side management in water-stressed areas.
Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA): Strategic funding to state higher educational institutions. Benefits: Infrastructure grants and quality improvement.
Gold Monetization Scheme: Mobilizing gold held by households. Benefits: Earn interest on idle gold and reduce gold imports.
Sovereign Gold Bond Scheme: Alternative to physical gold investment. Benefits: Capital appreciation plus fixed interest rate of 2.5% per annum.
Atal Innovation Mission: Promotion of innovation and entrepreneurship. Benefits: Support for Atal Tinkering Labs and Incubation Centers.
Deep Ocean Mission: Exploring the deep ocean for resources. Benefits: Deep sea mining technology and climate change advisory services.
UJALA Yojana: Unnat Jyoti by Affordable LEDs for All. Benefits: Efficient LED bulbs at subsidized prices to reduce electricity bills.
Saubhagya: Pradhan Mantri Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana. Benefits: Last-mile electricity connectivity to all un-electrified rural and urban households.
PRASAD Scheme: Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive. Benefits: Developing infrastructure at pilgrimage sites across India.
Swadesh Darshan Scheme: Integrated development of theme-based tourist circuits. Benefits: Better amenities and connectivity for domestic tourists.
PM-eBus Sewa: Promoting electric mobility in city bus operations. Benefits: Deployment of 10,000 e-buses and infrastructure development.
YUVA Scheme: Young, Upcoming and Versatile Authors. Benefits: Mentorship and scholarships for authors under 30 to promote Indian culture.
Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana: Generic medicines at affordable prices. Benefits: Quality medicines available at 50-90% lower cost than brands.
Bima Sakhi Yojana: Empowering women in rural areas as insurance agents. Benefits: Income opportunities and increased insurance penetration.
Operation Greens: Stabilizing the supply of Tomato, Onion and Potato (TOP) crops. Benefits: Support for food processing and logistics.
Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana-NRLM: Reducing poverty through self-help groups. Benefits: Credit-linked social mobilization and livelihood support.
